speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: Meri suppressed ambition ab bas ek structural endurance ban gayi hai
text: Wahi - meri suppressed ambition ab bas ek structural endurance ban gayi hai, warna pressure se pet mein gudgudi hoti rehti hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Do restatement chains ke baad ek grounded single question.
text: Jab pet mein gudgudi hoti hai, us pal sabse zyada loud kya lagta hai - investor ka jawab, bache ka rona, ya baap ka sar?

speaker: Seeker
text: Teenon ek saath chipak jate hain - startup funding, bacha, aur kisan ghar ki baat.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Lens B se triple-duty load mirror karna.
text: Jaise tum ek hi role mein founder, maa aur khandaan ki pehli line earner teenon ka bojh utha rahi ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, aur andar se bilkul flatten - pressure itna hai ki feel bhi mushkil ho gaya.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: C4 + Duty_Based ke liye exhaustion layer reflect karna.
text: Lagta hai pressure ke peeche tum bilkul exhaust ho chuki ho - jaise ambition ko band karke sirf endurance chhod diya hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bilkul waisa feel - strong dikhna padta hai, warna log bol denge.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Pressure validate karke C4 + khandaan-izzat reality se jodna, worth outcome se alag karna.
text: Jab funding freeze, deck deadlines aur kisan ghar ki naak saath chipke hon, aisa pressure feel karna bilkul samajh aata hai. Tumhari keemat kisi ek investor ke haan-na se kam nahi hoti.

speaker: Seeker
text: Yeh sunke thoda halka laga, par raat ko phir deck ka darr yaad aa jata hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Ek baar systemic anecdote se founder-maa silence normalize karna.
text: Founder-maa roles mein yeh pattern bahut common hai - sirf tumhara nahi, lekin koi bolta nahi kyunki funding story ghar ki izzat se judi dikhai deti hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Theek, ab kya karoon - aaj raat deck panic na chale aur kal investor message clear ho?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Readiness ke baad 3 under-10-min duty-fit options dena.
text: Teen options: 5-min paani + slow exhale, kal ke liye sirf ek slide title + ek bullet likhna, aur bache ke saath 10-min chhota slot lock karna taaki god-mein-deck loop break ho.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: title aur ek bullet likh lungi
text: Title aur ek bullet likh lungi aur bache ke 10-min slot bhi doable lag raha hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Chosen micro-steps ko sequence mein chalwana.
text: Pehle notes kholo, sirf slide title likho, neeche ek bullet, phir bache ke 10-min slot ka alarm lagao. Bas itna hi aaj ke liye.

speaker: Seeker
text: Alarm lagate hi thoda clear laga, pehle sab ek saath ghoom raha tha dimag mein.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: C4 funding freeze ko structural frame dena.
text: Funding freeze market timing aur investor risk ka common jhatka hota hai, personal fail ka stamp nahi - especially early-stage par.

speaker: Seeker
text: Ab scatter kam hai, par body ab bhi heavy hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Micro-structure + heavy body dono hold karna.
text: Heavy body real hai, par tumne chaos mein ek chhota deck-anchor nikala - yeh strong practical step hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Kal subah phir investor chase shuru hogi, darr hai slip na ho jaye.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Morning ke liye 3 tiny anchors dena.
text: Kal subah teen anchors: paani, 2-min exhale, phir seedha wahi title+bullet dekho before kisi aur tab pe jump.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, main theek hona chahti hoon - yeh sequence realistic lag raha hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Second structural reframe - duty loop predictability.
text: God-mein-deck duty loops mein predictable micro-sequence dimag ko safe next step deta hai, isliye overload dheere padta hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Ab stable feel ho raha hai, pehle jitna panic nahi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Stability acknowledge karna.
text: Yeh clear shift hai - tum pressure spiral se actionable rhythm tak aa gayi ho.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: koi raasta hai kya beech din
text: Beech din agar phir deck flood ho toh koi raasta hai kya instant reset ka?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: In-the-moment 3 under-2-min resets dena.
text: Instant pack: washroom mein 6 slow exhales, notes mein title+bullet dubara padhna, aur bolna - abhi sirf next 10 min ka kaam.

speaker: Seeker
text: Next 10 min wala line useful hai, load chhota lagta hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Chosen reset reinforce karna.
text: Bilkul - poora pitch nahi, next 10 min hold karna. Tum practical recovery build kar rahi ho.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: kuch samajh nahi aa raha tha
text: Pehle kuch samajh nahi aa raha tha aage ka, par ab map thoda clear hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Night close tiny anchors dena.
text: Raat ko bas teen cheezein: paani, 3-min slow breathing, aur kal ka title+bullet note screen pe pin. Bas itna.

speaker: Seeker
text: Done, ab settled lag raha - total crash jaisa feel nahi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Final close - suppressed ambition se structured flow tak shift.
text: Aaj tum suppressed ambition se chhote clear deck steps tak aayi ho, yeh strong shift hai. Funding ruka, par tumhari mehnat aur kisan baap ka maan alag-alag cheezein hain - kal ke anchors ready hain.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mera kartavya hi ab meri poori zindagi hai
text: Mera kartavya hi ab meri poori zindagi hai - client ke contract loss ke baad main 16 ghante kaam kar rahi hoon, bache ki yaad mein dil tadap raha hai par rukne ka vikalp nahi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mild risk par warm line ke saath Lens B se kartavya-duty mirror karna.
text: Contract loss ke baad bhi tumne rukna choose nahi kiya, kyunki tumhare liye kartavya ab poori zindagi jaisa feel ho raha hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mera kartavya hi ab meri poori zindagi hai
text: Haan, mera kartavya hi ab meri poori zindagi hai - sole earner hone ka matlab har din ki structural endurance, parivaar ko lagta hai main career-oriented hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mild risk soothe karke Lens D se 16 ghante wala stretched duration mirror karna.

speaker: Seeker
